id.title: ID
id.description:
ID optionally identifies the characteristic. Used by CDAR to
correlate a correction with a previously reported field.

type_code.title: Type Code
type_code.description:
TypeCode is the CDAR CharacteristicTypeCode. See the TypeCode*
constants for reserved values Flow 6 interprets directly.

reason_code.title: Reason Code
reason_code.description:
ReasonCode links this characteristic to a sibling bill.Reason
via its fr-ctc-reason-code extension value. Only meaningful on
rejection / dispute / partial-acceptance lines.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description is a free-form human-readable explanation.

changed.title: Changed
changed.description:
Changed signals whether the reported value represents a
correction (true) or is being reported unchanged (false).

direction.title: Direction
direction.description:
Direction carries the CDAR AdjustmentDirectionCode — typically
"+" or "-" when Changed is true.

name.title: Name
name.description:
Name is the semantic label of the field the characteristic
refers to.

location.title: Location
location.description:
Location is a locator (XPath, JSON pointer, etc.) into the
referenced invoice identifying the specific field.

value.title: Value
value.description: Value carries a free-form string value when the field is textual.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code carries a coded value when the field is itself a code.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percent holds a percentage value (e.g. a VAT rate correction).

amount.title: Amount
amount.description:
Amount holds a monetary value paired with its currency. Used
for the MEN on paid lines and for any price/total correction.

numeric.title: Numeric
numeric.description: Numeric holds a plain numeric value without currency.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Quantity holds a quantity value, optionally qualified by Measure.

measure.title: Measure
measure.description: Measure optionally describes the unit of Quantity or Numeric.

flow6.Characteristic.description: Characteristic mirrors the CDAR SpecifiedDocumentCharacteristic element (MDT-207 and friends) used on Flow 6 lifecycle messages.
